evidence.claim: Used Vue.js, pgvector, FAISS, BentoML, LLMs, Time Series, Vector Search, PEFT, Fine-tuning LLMs, JavaScript, NLP, RAG, and Elasticsearch
evidence.source_text: Skills: Vue.js (beginner, 15mo, 10 endorsements); pgvector (expert, 64mo, 41 endorsements); FAISS (advanced, 21mo, 50 endorsements); BentoML (advanced, 32mo, 54 endorsements); LLMs (advanced, 28mo, 31 endorsements); Time Series (advanced, 39mo, 57 endorsements); Vector Search (expert, 43mo, 36 endorsements); PEFT (advanced, 32mo, 44 endorsements); TTS (advanced, 39mo, 51 endorsements); Fine-tuning LLMs (expert, 48mo, 44 endorsements); JavaScript (beginner, 12mo, 13 endorsements); NLP (expert, 55mo, 41 endorsements); RAG (expert, 86mo, 59 endorsements); Elasticsearch (expert, 39mo, 26 endorsements)
Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31% at Vedantu
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling pipeline, feature pipeline, and training/eval workflow
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments), the feature pipeline, and the training/eval workflow.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems rather than just academic study
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes infrastructure and data quality over modeling
evidence.source_text: Most of the work was infrastructure and data quality — the modeling part was almost the easy bit.

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
